title: The Broken Array
description: A Minecraft Horror Mod Addon for the mod, The Broken Script
body:
# The Broken Array

### Here we are

**REQUIRED DEPENDENCIES**: [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/project/8BmcQJ2H)
(This mod does not need [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/project/TocuaDpt) to work, it can work alone)

Download alternatively if you are using [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-broken-array) instead.

### Things to know

- Mod can **kick** and **ban** you from your game (can be disabled in config)
- Mod **cannot** interact with your computer.
- Mod is basically finished. New content and bugfixes might still occur in the future!
- Mod contains loud sounds and flashing images.
- Mod has an ending and a true ending.

The Broken Array is a very slow burner addon mod to [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/project/TocuaDpt) featuring a lot of custom entities, events, bosses and much more!

<details>
<summary>Big Mod Spoliers!</summary>
This mod has over 30+ entities with all having different behaviors, most lurking in the overworld and a few in the cave.
It has a lore book system that tracks down any survived encounter from the entities.
At Day 4, you can enter a dimension with lore involving the past players before you in this world. There are teleporters in an area. Enter them and defeat the bosses, unlocking you to defeat the final boss. Once defeated, you can freely enter in a dimension to get the true ending.
</details>

The mod might have some issues so plz report any bugs found!! I will try my best to fix them all as I am a solo-working person.

Note: It **IS** compatible in **multiplayer** but there might be some bugs lurking, it is functionable but not fully perfect.

### Credits

- [RedstoneWizard08](https://modrinth.com/user/RedstoneWizard08) (creator of [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/project/TocuaDpt))
- [Gecko](https://modrinth.com/user/Gecko) (creator of [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/project/8BmcQJ2H))
